storyInfo: Ksenia wakes up. The Doctor and Mon3tr try asking her for clues to the Sarcophagus and Raidian's squad's whereabouts. Amiya and Mantra find a signal left behind by Raidian, and learn where the miners could have gone. As the miners escape, they run into a tragedy.

attributes.content: <p=1>Central Far North Mining District Laboratory, Ursus</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Ugh...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Ksenia!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Ksenia, are you awake? How are you feeling?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Feeling? I don't know. Am I supposed to feel something?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: You're not Kal'tsit.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: No... you were never her, why did I even ask you that...? Suka, my head—what am I even saying?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I'm Mon3tr, an Operator of Rhodes Island... and also a companion to Kal'tsit.
attributes.name: Mon3tr
Ksenia
attributes.content: Mon3tr, a familiar name, though I don't remember where I heard it... And what about you? Why are you—

attributes.name: Ksenia
attributes.content: *cough*, *cough* *cough*!
Easy now, no need to rush!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: We're from Rhodes Island.;We need your help.

attributes.content: So you're indeed connected to Director Kal'tsit.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Rhodes Island... Serafina talked about the place. What sort of help do you need?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: What help can I even give you, as I am now?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Oh, bog. Burn it.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I thought I'd be awake enough to destroy it myself... but it seems staying sober did not save me from this headache anyway.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: This was written for the dead, and I hope it did not cause you any offense.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: Sorry, but we read it.;We have questions.
You were a Sarcophagus researcher in Chernobog.;Your writing and way of addressing Kal'tsit prove this as well.

attributes.content: That was a long time ago...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I was just an assistant then, following Professor Ilia around and running basic data analyses. I barely had any significant ties to the project...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But now I see it is the very link to my ruin. I'd rather all of that had never happened at all.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: But you still treat Kal'tsit as your director, and the research is still on your mind.
Do you know where the Sarcophagus is currently located, or where it possibly could have gone?

attributes.content: It's complicated to explain, but we really have to find the Sarcophagus, we—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: No, wait. Explain. What do you mean by 'currently located'?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Is it not in Chernobog?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: —What?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: So, not only is the Sarcophagus no longer in Chernobog, the city itself has completely changed...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I don't know what happened, and I have no clue where it went either...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Sorry, I can't help you.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: Then, do you know of...;Artyom Chaadayev?

attributes.content: You... how do you know this name?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Let's skip that first! You know him, right? Did he ever tell you anything about the Sarcophagus—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: No... I've actually never met him.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: You what...?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: After the incident in Chernobog that year, someone with that name contacted me by mail...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: He called himself a friend of Professor Ilia, expressed his condolences about what happened, and showed a willingness to help out a student of his old friend and recommend me to some other laboratories within the country.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I once thought it a nasty joke... until the well-funded labs mentioned in the letter actually came looking for me.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: This would happen a few more times. Indeed he gave me many rare opportunities... but even now I have no idea who this man is, or why he helped me.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Yes... He invited me to Deity Grypherburg, claiming there was an important project I could deploy my skills on.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But I was tired, what could I even do...? Looking back on what I did, all I could bring was more calamity.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: If I had to choose where to end my miserable life, let it be the frozen soil out here in the Far North.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: (Doctor... what do we do now?)
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: (That project in Grypherburg sounds somewhat suspicious.);(It sounds like she doesn't know much about it either.)
Ksenia, how did you come to know Serafina?

attributes.content: The lab had to supervise the mobile medical team in the mining district, so we got acquainted rather quickly.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Though we never spoke much to each other. They don't allow researchers to get too close to anyone unrelated to the project.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: It's a bit too late now, if you wanted to find her. She left the lab with your people.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: With that group of miners...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: That's all I know.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: What is the 'Oka' mentioned in your writing?;What kind of experiments did you do on the Infected miners?

attributes.content: A wretched mistake...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I didn't know... I had no idea they would use 'Oka' to do those things...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: Calm down...;There's still time to rectify mistakes.

attributes.content: <p=1>Central Far North Mining District, Ursus</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: The Central Mining District is huge, and all eleven mines are connected by a surface transport system.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Stations are installed at every mine to deliver raw ore to be washed, processed, and stored in the warehouse.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The map seems to indicate this is the largest warehouse, and the worker dormitories are right next to it, with the south mine exit behind.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: This layout...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Storing Originium in a warehouse so close to the dormitories does not mean they trust the miners, but that they absolutely do not care about the hazard posed by active Originium particles.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Amiya.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Yes? Did you find something?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: A chip.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I saw it from the research lab terminal. Every miner here has a positioning chip in them. This could be why the miners we met earlier were found by the Patrol Unit.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Before the miners we were chasing chose to leave, they must have gotten rid of these.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Did they tear out the chips themselves?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You were right, Captain! In the south dorms, we found bandages, hemostats and other medical equipment, all Rhodes Island issue.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: There's blood on the bandages and equipment. They turned the metal beds into a makeshift operating table, and might have performed surgery on it.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: I suspect quite a big fight happened here, and the injured had to patch up their wounds.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: So those are normal findings.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Captain's asking if you've seen any tracking chips that were forcibly removed.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: No sign of any such thing.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No, we've swept this area.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: As Eloysius says, the man-made damage inside and outside the warehouse seems to imply a fight broke out.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: But I think it was a minor scuffle, unless the fresh snow is covering up some of the aftermath...
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Alright, good work!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Captain, should we go take a look?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: There is no answer, but the Phidia walks straight in the warehouse's direction.
The soldier pauses, then follows the group's footsteps.
Looks like you figured it out. To be honest, I called it a big fight, because—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The Guardswoman steps to one side and motions Elysium to help lift a waterproof sheet.
The revealed hole is filled with uneven matter covered up with a white substance that at a glance appears to be thick and dirty snow.
This smell... doesn't seem to be snow.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Correct. It's limestone.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: And below it are corpses.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I told your Operator earlier I already investigated the area, and they took it as-is, and did not search the place any further.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I wasn't going to tell you about this...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: They probably wanted to burn the bodies first, before realizing they couldn't get a big enough fire going and resorted to whatever was around. Quicklime to cover the stench, and the waterproof sheet to hide the hole.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It worked, since we didn't smell the blood, yes?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Captain's saying the dead are Patrol Unit members.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I can't say for sure. I'll climb down the hole and find out just who our unlucky customers are.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I... I'll help.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: It's fine. Just pull me up later.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Eloysius jumps right down, and stands on the edge of the hole as she wipes some limestone off.
She grabs a sleeve, quickly drops it, and goes over to check the clothes on the next body.
Alright. Could you help me back up?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Before anyone extends their hand, Mantra moves her thick tail down and wraps it around Eloysius to hoist her up, then releases her gently onto the ground.
Ugh...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I've never been treated like this!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Alright not the best time for that so sorry Captain.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I'll get to the point. Most of the bodies down there are indeed Patrol Unit members—the first and second layers, at least.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I found this too.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The crowd looks at the fragile crystal fragment in her hand. Most of it has been charred, but the neat circuit proves it used to be a chip.
Quite a few on the ground down there. Fragments like this one, or even less.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It seems like they made a difficult choice.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: You're putting it lightly.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Captain says, the miners probably attracted the Patrol Unit with their chips, and then offed them all in one shot.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: After all, they only got the time to remove everyone else's chips after eliminating their pursuers.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: This sort of organization and ability... certainly not your garden variety miners.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Their leader definitely has military expertise... or perhaps something else.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Something else...?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: An Ursine folktale. 'The great Yurodstvo descends upon those in distress, and leads them out of dire straits'... just a tale born of boredom, though, so don't pay it much mind.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But we ought to find them before their actions become more radical.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: After all, it's just the Patrol Unit today, but tomorrow it could be the military police, and then... it might just be the Royal Guard.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We have to find them before things get even worse.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Mantra... what are you looking for?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Mantra's eyes sweep through her surroundings, and after a long silence, Amiya hears her voice in her mind.
That young Imperial Guardswoman reminded me of something.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The Yurodstvo.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I think... I remember seeing this word in Dr. Kal'tsit's documents. It was related to Ursine research on demons...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: A long, long, time ago, I too was on Ursine soil.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: After a few mishaps, I was taken to be a Yurodstvo.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Only then did I learn of an unrecorded Ursus secret, so hidden that even libraries in Sargon's City of Gold did not know it.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: The people of Ursus venerate the Yurodstvo; they believe the Yurodstvo's love transcends both the mortal realm and suffering, and this is how it has the power to lead one astray.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: So you think what's happening here is related to the Yurodstvo? But shouldn't the Yurodstvo be at the heart of Deity Grypherburg...?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Only a hunch of mine. Everything that has happened here gives me a sense of unsettling familiarity.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Amiya follows Mantra's gaze and scans the area, but does not catch anything unusual.
Perhaps I was overthinking. But I also found some unexpected delight.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Raidian has left a beacon nearby.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: News from her? Wonderful!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: So this is how you and Raidian communicate—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Back at Babel, Raidian was my first assistant.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But her talent far exceeded that role, and she led her own squad after becoming an Elite Operator.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I heard there used to be many on Rhodes Island who feared you before Raidian joined us...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Occasionally, it proves to be true.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Some of our colleagues are better at speaking than thinking, and interactions can be problematic, while I am no expert at 'explanation.'
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: That is how my 'fearsome reputation' got passed around the Rhodes Island water coolers.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: A few emergency operations where I probed into minds without prior notice, and after several rounds of exaggerated retellings, I became a witch who could stick my hand into their heads to toy with their minds.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Oh! I heard this one, in a story Theresa told me... I thought it was a Sarkaz legend.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Perhaps that was a true Sarkaz tale. The Speaker would have been defending me in saying that.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: After Raidian joined Babel, she stood among those defending my reputation.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But today... Elysium is the flagbearer in that regard, as are you.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: It's our responsibility!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Just as I thought.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Found them.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra reaches out to wipe snow off the beacon's base, and slowly the symbols on it are revealed.
She feels the faint signals left on them, and some words gradually float into her mind.
<p=1>Central Far North Mining District, Ursus</> <p=2>Three days ago...</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: You know what, doctor?
attributes.name: Injured Miner

attributes.content: We beat those Patrol Unit monsters!
attributes.name: Injured Miner

attributes.content: Please, calm down and don't move! It's a deep wound!
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: Haha! No big deal, my life would've been well-lived, even if all I managed was ending the lives of those brutes.
attributes.name: Injured Miner

attributes.content: How can I even relax like this?
attributes.name: Injured Miner

attributes.content: I never imagined this. Those high and mighty Patrol Unit guys couldn't either, I bet. That one day they would have to bow down to the Infected!
attributes.name: Injured Miner

attributes.content: He even asked us to spare his life? Lucky I went straight for his head!
attributes.name: Injured Miner

attributes.content: Rankin was right. No one can tread on us forever! We'll drag those old bastards down from their ivory towers one by one, and let them have a taste of the ground!
attributes.name: Injured Miner

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: Rankin, we've already searched the place.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: A total of ten Ursine medium-sized military trucks, with little fuel left. If everyone gets on, it'll only last us around two hundred kilometers.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Besides weapons and medicine, we found some food and water. It's not much, though it's no medicine either...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: That's pretty good already.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I don't think these were worth the price we paid...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Right, we discovered a container door with extra encryption on it... we need an identification code.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Hmph... Can anyone here tell me what other secrets are lying around here?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Patrolling the mines at this hour, on this day? No telling me you stumbled here from boredom.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I don't know...
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: I'm just a driver! No better than a burdenbeast, I go wherever the captain tells me to!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: The code or your life. Choose.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I don't know! I really don't know!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: They've never given us the code to prevent the goods from running off! Only the recipient can open it!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: 'Running off'? What kind of 'thing' would do that?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Answer me! What the hell's inside those containers?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Nikto, give me one of those explosives.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin, what are you—
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Just do as I say!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin sticks a small Originium bomb on the container's lock. A simple move, but he almost drops it from how fast he's breathing.
Ah...
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: The door slowly falls.
Rankin sees no fewer than thirty to forty bodies packed in a ten-meter-squared container, all long deceased, with no exception.
Some had struggled to the very last, their Originium crystals piercing into neighbors with messy, bloody wounds—no doubt, they were stuffed in here still alive.
Rankin can no longer tell what stole their lives away, and he does not wish to think about it...
Did you know?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I, what—
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Drop the act!!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Who was it... who gave you the order?!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: The mine boss—No, the Grand Duchess! She made us do it!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: She cares about the miners here! Those in charge here get punished if the head count drops!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: They always have to patch up the gap by buying some Infected with their own funds whenever one miner escapes—sometimes they get non-Infected to solve their problem, and it costs more.
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: But I have nothing to do with all that! Look, you already killed the actual bad guys!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: I'm just a driver who listens to his boss... I'm the same as you, right...?
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Infected, sir, please, let me go. I promise I'll desert the Patrol Unit, just pretend I died—
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: No, we're different, you and I.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: None of us willingly became Infected... but you had a choice. You could have chosen not to stand on the same side as those murderers.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: There's no reason I should forgive you.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin, we're done organizing the food we found.
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: These Patrol Unit guys have it good. Tonight we can—
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: ...Father?
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: ...What?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Father? Is that really you?
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Wonderful! Please, explain it to him! Tell him I'm not evil—My father's an Infected, how could I hate them?
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Ganea... didn't you... go to Grypherburg...?
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: I did! I really did, I didn't lie to you!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: But I needed money to stay alive, even in Grypherburg! They don't just hand out bread and mead—being a driver was the only option I had.
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Father, please... save me... I'll never do this again...
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Hawley...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: He silently stares at the oblivious elderly miner, then gestures at Hawley with his head to look at the container.
I won't try to reform him, much less release him.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: If he truly is your son...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin throws a knife on the ground and walks away.
No... wait...
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: This, is not my boy, is it?
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: Father...?
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Even the late autumn weather fails to prevent the corpses' rotting stench from spreading out into the air.
The old miner's gaze shifts between the mess of mangled limbs in the dark depths of the container and the tall young man before him...
Finally, he shakes his head incessantly, as if refusing to believe the truth.
My son wouldn't... wouldn't say such words. He wouldn't do something this disgraceful.
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: You're just... a damned bastard...
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: Why—Why do you wear my son's skin? Why do you live inside his body?!
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: Originally trembling, the old miner explodes into a rage, knocking the man down to the ground.
His fists rain like a storm, as if trying to drive something out of the body.
The man has no strength to resist.
Who are you? Who the hell are you?!
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: Oh, poor Ganea, his soul could have been saved! This isn't how it should have been! It was you, abomination, that left him with nowhere to go!
attributes.name: Hawley
Hawley
attributes.content: Just—

attributes.name: Hawley
attributes.content: Die!!!
